creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #1)
I am using a desktop computer and I don't have any "pc speaker" installed on my motherboard. So, bell ring only works on "pc speaker"? I thought I could hear it through headphones or stereo speakers.

Here is the hardware probe link to my computer specs.
https://bsd-hardware.info/?probe=b4a25585d8

> You can also try:
> kldload speaker
> spkrtest

That did not generate any sound.
